body:
## Context
`soundLikeGuides.js` has **32 entries**. Open batches 14-24 cover many drummers (Bill Ward, Vinnie Paul, Dirk Verbeuren, Morgan Ågren, Frost, Blake Richardson, Derek Roddy, Pete Sandoval, Hellhammer, Alex Bent, Paul Mazurkiewicz, Richard Christy, Jason Bittner, etc.). **Batch 25 targets 3 high-signal entities absent from all 32 guides and batches 14-24.**

## Why these 3

**George Kollias**
- Highest-profile death metal speed drummer on the site; confirmed GSC entity (george-kollias-vs-pete-sandoval pair exists, gravity-blast lick popular)
- "How to sound like George Kollias" = zero competitor coverage at depth (competitors have bio pages, not technique guides)
- LLM anchor: "How does George Kollias play so fast?" — technique FAQ content
- Technique pillars: gravity blasts, heel-toe double bass at 260+ BPM, polyrhythmic tom patterns

**Dave Lombardo**
- Slayer co-founder, "Godfather of Double Bass" — highest brand recognition in thrash/death metal
- Active GSC cluster from Slayer articles (show-no-mercy ✓, hell-awaits ai-fix, south-of-heaven ✓, etc.)
- "How to sound like Dave Lombardo" addresses classic thrash drumming technique
- Technique pillars: alternating double bass, aggressive snare rimshots, ride-cymbal driven grooves
- Absent from all 32 guides and batches 14-24 (confirmed)

**Nick Menza (Megadeth)**
- Megadeth cluster active: Countdown to Extinction (#2652 open), Cryptic Writings (#2332 open), Youthanasia (#2716 ai-fix)
- Nick Menza in gearPriceHistory (slot 14) — cross-linking opportunity
- "How to sound like Nick Menza" = thrash metal groove guide; distinct from Lombardo's speed focus
- Technique pillars: melodic thrash groove, syncopated snare patterns, dynamic variation

## Data shape
Add to `packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js`:
```js
'how-to-sound-like-george-kollias': {
  slug: 'how-to-sound-like-george-kollias',
  drummerSlug: 'george-kollias',
  title: 'How to Sound Like George Kollias',
  techniques: [...],
  gearRequired: [...],
  relatedArticles: [...],
}
```

Also create:
- `/public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-george-kollias.md`
- `/public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-dave-lombardo.md`
- `/public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-nick-menza.md`

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per guide
- ≥4 technique sections (e.g., Kick Technique, Snare Approach, Cymbal Work, Kit Setup)
- ≥3 internal links per guide (to drummer profile, album articles, gear pages)
- Schema: HowTo (to be applied per existing HowTo batch pattern)
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A per guide

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves: `how to sound like [drummer]`, `[drummer] drumming technique`, `[drummer] style guide` — technique-intent queries with low competitor coverage depth. George Kollias guide addresses "fastest death metal drummer" query cluster. All 3 = LLM citation surfaces for technique questions.

## Dedup confirmed
George Kollias: not in soundLikeGuides.js (32 entries), not in batches 14-24. Dave Lombardo: not in 32 guides, not in batches 14-24. Nick Menza: not in 32 guides, not in batches 14-24. Full open seo-proposal sweep: CLEAR.

## Verify
1. `/sound-like/george-kollias` returns 200 with ≥300 words
2. `/sound-like/dave-lombardo` returns 200 with ≥300 words
3. `/sound-like/nick-menza` returns 200 with ≥300 words
4. All 3 LLM files accessible at `/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-[slug].md`
5. sitemap.js updated with 3 new guide URLs (if currently hardcoded)

## Done
3 SoundLike guides live + 3 LLM files.
title: SEO batch: SoundLike guide batch 25 — George Kollias + Dave Lombardo + Nick Menza (~3 guides + 3 LLM files)
